basic_details.job_title: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Bharathidasan University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Guest Lecturer: M.A., Ph.D (or) SLET/NET in History

salary_details.details: Guest Lecturer: Rs. 500 per hour, subject to a maximum of Rs. 20,000 per month

all_official_links.label: Download Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Bharathidasan University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Lecturer: M.A., Ph.D (or) SLET/NET in History

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Guest Lecturer: Rs. 500 per hour, subject to a maximum of Rs. 20,000 per month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Bharathidasan University Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Lecturer position at Bharathidasan University is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the required qualifications for the Guest Lecturer position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Guest Lecturer role, candidates must possess an M.A. degree, a Ph.D., or have cleared the SLET/NET examination in History.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Lecturer position is Rs. 500 per hour, with a maximum monthly earning capped at Rs. 20,000. This is a contractual appointment.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Guest Lecturer recruitment at Bharathidasan University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: Bharathidasan University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Guest Lecturer through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Guest Lecturer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Lecturer position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Bharathidasan University, Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 620024. Specific details about the exact hall will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including educational certificates, ID proof, and any relevant experience certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Guest Lecturer position at Bharathidasan University is a contractual job. The appointment is for a specific period as per the university's requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before attending the walk-in interview.
